name: Royale Play Safari
desc: Official Royale Play Safari texture. A water-based interior wall texture paint containing metallic pigments. Imparts a wind-swept desert sand dune effect with dynamic metallic lustre.
rooms: Living Room Accents, Media Walls, Dining Backdrops

name: Royale Play Infinitex (Sandstone)
desc: Official Royale Play Infinitex nature-inspired texture. Sculpted, gritty sandstone plaster simulating natural rock block layouts. Perfect for massive architectural features.

name: Royale Play Stucco (Venetian)
desc: Official Royale Play Stucco marble finish. A slaked-lime plaster coating buffed to a mirror-like high-sheen polish. Provides the ultimate luxury feel of natural Italian marble slabs.
rooms: Foyer Arches, Bed Headboards, Puja Walls

name: Royale Play Taana-Baana (Linen)
desc: Official Taana-Baana heritage series fabric texture. Mimics the crossed weave lines of raw, organic hand-woven Indian linen. Adds a warm, calm, and rustic textile feel to walls.
maintenance: Dry vacuum clean / Gentle damp wipe

name: Royale Play Dune (Silver Drizzle)
desc: Official Royale Play Dune finish. Metallic sand texture loaded with shimmering silver rain effects. Reacts dynamically to both warm natural sunlight and indoor highlight spots.
rooms: Master Bedrooms, TV Backdrops, Study Backdrops

name: Royale Play Archi Concrete
desc: Official Archi Concrete industrial finish. Mimics exposed, distressed raw concrete plaster panels. Perfectly complements modern loft design aesthetics, metal accents, and wood decors.
rooms: Creative Offices, Media Consoles, Library Walls

name: Royale Play Marmorino
desc: Official Royale Play Marmorino slaked-lime plaster. Recreates a soft, semi-polished, multi-tonal limestone finish showing deep structural layers and elegant light-scattering properties.

name: Royale Play Metallo Fuso
desc: Official Royale Play Metallo Fuso high-end metallic coating. Made with real metallic powders to recreate the heavy, luxurious look of molten liquid metal on feature walls.

name: Wall Fashion Moroccan Trellis Stencil
desc: Official Wall Fashion repeating geometric stencil. An interlocking Moroccan arch lattice pattern overlay. Elevates standard walls into Mediterranean style luxury statement screens.
rooms: Dining Room Walls, Entry Foyer, Long Corridors
finish: Royale Glitz Metallic over Matte Base

name: Wall Fashion Lotus Medallion Stencil
desc: Official Wall Fashion circular medallion stencil. A beautifully symmetrical lotus mandala motif. Adds spiritual calm, traditional warmth, and classic auspicious focus points.
rooms: Pooja Room Walls, Ceiling Centers, Main Foyer
finish: Brass Gold Stencil Print on Matte Base
maintenance: Wipe clean with soft micro-fiber cloth

name: Wall Fashion Fern Canopy Stencil
desc: Official nature-inspired repeating leaf stencil. Overlapping banana leaves and tropical palm fronds that instantly recreate a fresh garden resort breeze in Kerala homes.
rooms: Balcony Sitouts, Dining Halls, Staircase Walls

name: Wall Fashion Chevron Geometry Stencil
desc: Official contemporary geometric repeating stencil. Sharp, high-contrast repeating zig-zag stripes designed to build architectural scale and structural height.
rooms: Kids Bedrooms, Home Theaters, Accent Boarders
finish: Gloss Highlight Pattern on Matte Emulsion

name: Wall Fashion Rising Waves Stencil
desc: Official Art Deco sunburst border stencil. Represents rising metallic wave arcs in repeating columns. Offers an elegant, glamorous, and luxury-retro backdrop.

name: Wall Fashion Bamboo Stalks Stencil
desc: Official nature leaf stencil. Tall, slender vertical bamboo poles with fluttering leaves. Introduces calming organic structure and fluid heights to narrow wall faces.

name: Wall Fashion Buds & Blossoms Stencil
desc: Official delicate border stencil design. Intricate running flower vine patterns stenciled carefully to frame doors, windows, and ceiling borders.
rooms: Bed borders, Pooja Entrances, Arch Frames
finish: Soft Off-white Silken Sheen Over Matte

name: Wall Fashion Damask Tapestry Stencil
desc: Official royal damask brocade wallpaper style stencil. Intricate repeating heritage design motifs that turn flat walls into regal upholstered-feel tapestries.
rooms: Formal Living Rooms, Guest Lounges, Master Suites
finish: Gloss Varnish Pattern on Luxury Emulsion
